title: PromotionReceipt
description: Approval receipt required before promoted evidence may be cited on public surfaces. Evidence without a valid PromotionReceipt must produce an abstain outcome.

promotion_receipt_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this promotion receipt.

approved.description: True when evidence is approved for public citation. False must produce abstain downstream.

generated_at.description: UTC timestamp when this receipt was generated.

digest.description: Optional sha256 digest of the approved evidence artifact.
